assumptions.description: User has a basic understanding of programming concepts and terminology
User has a preferred programming language for coding and development

constraints.description: Chatbot must be hosted on a cloud-based infrastructure to ensure scalability and reliability
Chatbot must integrate with popular coding platforms and tools to provide seamless interaction

out_of_scope.description: Chatbot will not provide direct coding services or complete projects for users
Chatbot will not support languages other than those specified in the feature requirements

user_stories.title: User Needs Help with Code Suggestion
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want the chatbot to suggest improvements to my code, so I can write more efficient and readable code

user_stories.title: User Needs Help with Debugging Tips
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want the chatbot to provide debugging tips and best practices, so I can identify and fix errors in my code

user_stories.title: User Needs Help with Error Explanation
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want the chatbot to explain error messages and suggest corrections to my code, so I can understand and resolve issues quickly

functional_requirements.name: User Authentication
functional_requirements.description: Develop a user authentication system to store user information and track interaction history

functional_requirements.name: Language Detection
functional_requirements.description: Develop an algorithm to detect the programming language used in the user's input code

functional_requirements.name: Code Analysis
functional_requirements.description: Develop a feature to analyze the user's input code and provide suggestions for optimization, improvement, and best practices

functional_requirements.name: Error Explanation
functional_requirements.description: Develop a feature to explain the error messages and suggest corrections to the user's input code

functional_requirements.name: Multi-Language Support
functional_requirements.description: Support multiple programming languages in the chatbot, including but not limited to Python, Java, C++, JavaScript

functional_requirements.name: Chat Interface
functional_requirements.description: Develop a user-friendly chat interface to interact with the user and provide coding guidance and advice

functional_requirements.name: Knowledge Base
functional_requirements.description: Create a knowledge base of comprehensive coding information, best practices, and guidelines to provide accurate and relevant responses

non_functional_requirements.name: Scalability
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure the chatbot can handle a large volume of user traffic and adapt to changing demands

non_functional_requirements.name: Security
non_functional_requirements.description: Implement robust security measures to protect user data, prevent unauthorized access, and ensure data integrity

non_functional_requirements.name: User Experience
non_functional_requirements.description: Provide a seamless and intuitive user experience to interact with the chatbot and access coding guidance and advice

non_functional_requirements.name: Accessibility
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure the chatbot is accessible on various devices, including desktop, mobile, and tablets
